info.title: VaultPublisher
info.description: VaultPublisher is a tool that assists in publishing Obsidian notes to a static-site generator. Currently only supportz Quartz.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Publishes files from a source directory to a target directory

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get a configuration setting by key.

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The key of the configuration setting

commands.name: set
commands.description: Sets the configuration setting to the provided value.

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The key of the configuration setting to set

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The value of the configuration setting to set

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Removes the configuration setting with the provided key.

arguments.name: key
arguments.description: The key of the configuration setting to remove

commands.name: publish
commands.description: Publishes the contents of the source directory to the destination directory
